_Kestrel_comment: Bind explicitly to 5080 so the service does not collide with the website's default 5000 binding.

As400Sync._Sync_comment: Auto-update flags. All default to false so the service stays idle until an admin clicks a button on /Admin/As400Sync (or flips a flag here).
As400Sync._Hub_comment: SignalR hub on the website. The service connects to this URL on startup as ServiceId.
